name: Bean and Pistou Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans White beans, rinsed and drained (19-ounce cans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chicken broth and white beans in a saucepan over moderate heat and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce the heat to low and stir in the pesto sauce, grated Parmesan cheese, and black pepper.
3. Simmer for about 1 minute.
Makes four 1-cup servings.
Nutrition information per serving: Calories: 496 Protein: 29.4 grams Fat: 11.5 grams Cholesterol: 3.9 mg Fiber: 22.1 grams Sodium: 483 mg
